name: Aurora VA
explanation: A clean modern virtual-analog lead in the Nord Lead lineage. Distinct from a hypersaw VA: a single morphable oscillator whose Shape control sweeps continuously from sine through triangle and sawtooth to pulse, with oscillator Sync for bite, a clean resonant low-pass with its own envelope, and a snappy amp envelope. 8-voice poly. Controls: Shape (waveform morph), Cutoff, Resonance, Sync, Env Amount and Level.
